metadata.name: blockchain
classifiers: Intended Audience :: Financial and Insurance Industry

modules.name: setup
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python

modules.name: blockchain.createwallet
documentation:
This module corresponds to functionality documented
at https://blockchain.info/api/create_wallet

functions.name: blockchain.createwallet.create_wallet
documentation:
Create a new Blockchain.info wallet. It can be created containing a
pre-generated private key or will otherwise generate a new private key.

```
param str password

password for the new wallet. At least 10 characters.

param str api_code

API code with create wallets permission

param str service_url

URL to an instance of service-my-wallet-v3 (with trailing slash)

param str priv

private key to add to the wallet (optional)

param str label

label for the first address in the wallet (optional)

param str email

email to associate with the new wallet (optional)

return

an instance of  class
```

modules.name: blockchain.pushtx
documentation:
This module allows users to push hex encoded transactions to the bitcoin network.
Corresponds to https://blockchain.info/pushtx

functions.name: blockchain.pushtx.pushtx
documentation:
Push a hex encoded transaction to the network.

:param str tx: hex encoded transaction
:param str api_code: Blockchain.info API code (optional)

modules.name: blockchain.exchangerates
documentation:
This module corresponds to functionality documented at 
https://blockchain.info/api/exchange_rates_api

functions.name: blockchain.exchangerates.get_ticker
documentation:
Call the 'ticker' method and return a dictionary
of {class}`Currency` objects.

```
param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

a dictionary in the format of ccy_symbol(str):currency()
```

functions.name: blockchain.exchangerates.to_btc
documentation:
Call the 'tobtc' method and convert x value in the provided currency to BTC.

```
param str ccy

currency code

param float value

value to convert

param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code

return

the value in BTC
```

functions.name: blockchain.exchangerates.to_fiat
documentation:
Call the 'frombtc' method and convert x value in the provided currency to BTC.

```
param str ccy

currency code

param float value

BTC value to convert

param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code

return

the value in fiat currency
```

modules.name: blockchain.wallet
documentation:
This module corresponds to functionality documented
at https://blockchain.info/api/blockchain_wallet_api

classes.name: blockchain.wallet.Wallet

methods.name: blockchain.wallet.Wallet.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a wallet object.

:param str identifier: wallet identifier (GUID)
:param str password : decryption password
:param str service_url : URL to an instance of service-my-wallet-v3 (with trailing slash)
:param str second_password: second password (optional)
:param str api_code: Blockchain.info API code

methods.name: blockchain.wallet.Wallet.send
documentation:
Send bitcoin from your wallet to a single address.

```
param str to

recipient bitcoin address

param int amount

amount to send (in satoshi)

param str from_address

specific address to send from (optional)

param int fee

transaction fee in satoshi. Must be greater than the default
fee (optional).

return

an instance of  class
```

methods.name: blockchain.wallet.Wallet.send_many
documentation:
Send bitcoin from your wallet to multiple addresses.

```
param dictionary recipients

dictionary with the structure of 'address':amount

param str from_address

specific address to send from (optional)

param int fee

transaction fee in satoshi. Must be greater than the default
fee (optional).

return

an instance of  class
```

methods.name: blockchain.wallet.Wallet.get_balance
documentation:
Fetch the wallet balance. Includes unconfirmed transactions
and possibly double spends.

```
return

wallet balance in satoshi
```

methods.name: blockchain.wallet.Wallet.list_addresses
documentation:
List all active addresses in the wallet.

```
return

an array of  objects
```

methods.name: blockchain.wallet.Wallet.get_address
documentation:
Retrieve an address from the wallet.

```
param str address

address in the wallet to look up

return

an instance of  class
```

methods.name: blockchain.wallet.Wallet.new_address
documentation:
Generate a new address and add it to the wallet.

```
param str label

label to attach to this address (optional)

return

an instance of  class
```

methods.name: blockchain.wallet.Wallet.archive_address
documentation:
Archive an address.

```
param str address

address to archive

return

string representation of the archived address
```

methods.name: blockchain.wallet.Wallet.unarchive_address
documentation:
Unarchive an address.

```
param str address

address to unarchive

return

string representation of the unarchived address
```

The {class}`Wallet` class mirrors operations listed on the wallet API page.
It needs to be initialized on a per-wallet basis and will cache the wallet
identitifer, password, second password and API key (if provided).

modules.name: blockchain.statistics
documentation:
This module corresponds to functionality documented
at https://blockchain.info/api/charts_api

functions.name: blockchain.statistics.get
documentation:
Get network statistics.

```
param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

an instance of  class
```

functions.name: blockchain.statistics.get_chart
documentation:
Get chart data of a specific chart type.

```
param str chart_type

type of chart

param str time_span

duration of the chart.
```

Default is 1 year for most charts, 1 week for mempool charts (optional)
(Example: 5weeks)
\:param str rolling_average: duration over which the data should be averaged (optional)
\:param str api_code: Blockchain.info API code (optional)
\:return: an instance of {class}`Chart` class

functions.name: blockchain.statistics.get_pools
documentation:
Get number of blocks mined by each pool.

```
param str time_span

duration of the chart.
```

Default is 4days (optional)
\:param str api_code: Blockchain.info API code (optional)
\:return: an instance of dict:{str,int}

modules.name: blockchain.v2.receive
documentation:
This module corresponds to functionality documented
at https://blockchain.info/api/api_receive

functions.name: blockchain.v2.receive.receive
documentation:
Call the '/v2/receive' endpoint and create a forwarding address.

```
param str xpub

extended public key to generate payment address

param str callback

callback URI that will be called upon payment

param str api_key

Blockchain.info API V2 key

return

an instance of  class
```

functions.name: blockchain.v2.receive.callback_log
documentation:
Call the 'v2/receive/callback_log' endpoint and returns the callback log
for a given callback URI with parameters.

```
param callback

callback URI

param api_key

Blockchain.info API V2 key

return

a list of  objects
```

functions.name: blockchain.v2.receive.check_gap
documentation:
Call the 'v2/receive/checkgap' endpoint and returns the callback log
for a given callback URI with parameters.

```
param str xpub

extended public key

param str api_key

Blockchain.info API V2 key

return

an int
```

modules.name: blockchain.blockexplorer
documentation:
This module corresponds to functionality documented
at https://blockchain.info/api/blockchain_api

functions.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.get_block
documentation:
Get a single block based on a block hash.

```
param str block_id

block hash to look up

param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

an instance of  class
```

functions.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.get_tx
documentation:
Get a single transaction based on a transaction hash.

```
param str tx_id

transaction hash to look up

param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

an instance of  class
```

functions.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.get_block_height
documentation:
Get an array of blocks at the specified height.

```
param int height

block height to look up

param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

an array of  objects
```

functions.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.get_address
documentation:
Get data for a single address including an address balance and list of relevant transactions.

```
param str address

address(base58 or hash160) to look up

param FilterType filter

the filter for transactions selection (optional)

param int limit

limit number of transactions to display (optional)

param int offset

number of transactions to skip when display (optional)

param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

an instance of  class
```

functions.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.get_xpub
documentation:
Get data for a single xpub including balance and list of relevant transactions.

```
param str xpub

address(xpub) to look up

param FilterType filter

the filter for transactions selection (optional)

param int limit

limit number of transactions to fetch (optional)

param int offset

number of transactions to skip when fetch (optional)

param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

an instance of  class
```

functions.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.get_multi_address
documentation:
Get aggregate summary for multiple addresses including overall balance, per address balance

: and list of relevant transactions.

```
param tuple addresses

addresses(xpub or base58) to look up

param FilterType filter

the filter for transactions selection (optional)

param int limit

limit number of transactions to fetch (optional)

param int offset

number of transactions to skip when fetch (optional)

param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

an instance of  class
```

functions.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.get_balance
documentation:
Get balances for each address provided.

```
param tuple addresses

addresses(xpub or base58) to look up

param FilterType filter

the filter for transactions selection (optional)

param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

a dictionary of str, 
```

functions.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.get_unspent_outputs
documentation:
Get unspent outputs for a single address.

```
param tuple addresses

addresses(xpub or base58) to look up

param int confirmations

minimum confirmations to include (optional)

param int limit

limit number of unspent outputs to fetch (optional)

param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

an array of  objects
```

functions.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.get_latest_block
documentation:
Get the latest block on the main chain.

```
param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

an instance of  class
```

functions.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.get_unconfirmed_tx
documentation:
Get a list of currently unconfirmed transactions.

```
param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

an array of  objects
```

functions.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.get_blocks
documentation:
Get a list of blocks for a specific day or mining pool.
Both parameters are optional but at least one is required.

```
param int time

time in milliseconds

param str pool_name

name of the mining pool

param str api_code

Blockchain.info API code (optional)

return

an array of  objects
```

classes.name: blockchain.blockexplorer.SimpleAddress
documentation: to represent the address summary in multiaddress
